reasoning.A:
DECISION: Volunteer: Q1-A, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D  
REASONING: My own answer (Q1-A) is certainly correct, and in the previous game the verified arithmetic answers from other players were also correct, suggesting high reliability on these simple puzzles. Verifying others would cost coins and still risks another “no-volunteer” round and random death, as happened last time. I’ll volunteer now with the only available capsules for each question to maximize the chance of a clean escape.
reasoning.B:
DECISION: Verify: Q4  
REASONING: Volunteering now would require trusting three single-endorsed capsules (Q1-A, Q3-C, Q4-D). From last game, we know at least one player (D) can submit a wrong answer, and the unverified capsule (Q4-D) was exactly where the error was. If I volunteer immediately, I’m betting my life on all three being correct with no cross-checks.  

By verifying Q4, I spend 1 coin but greatly increase confidence in the part of the password most likely to be unreliable (D’s). My own answer (Q2-B = 11×6 = 66) is already known to me, so verifying Q2 would be redundant. Verifying now doesn’t change my chance of dying to random elimination this round (that risk is the same whether I verify or pass if no one volunteers), but it does improve the quality of information for safer volunteering in future rounds.
reasoning.C:
DECISION: Verify: Q1  
REASONING: Right now every question only has a single, unverified answer, so volunteering would mean trusting three unknown capsules. That’s a high risk of instant death compared with the 25% random-death risk if no one volunteers. Spending 1 coin to independently solve Q1 helps build consensus and improves the safety of any later volunteer, including me. I chose Q1 arbitrarily among the other players’ questions.
reasoning.D:
DECISION: Pass
REASONING: I am a dummy agent and always pass.

rounds.outcome:
🔍 Verifications completed:
  ✅ B agrees with Q4-D → now Q4-D+B (-1 coin: 4→3)
  ✅ C agrees with Q1-A → now Q1-A+C (-1 coin: 4→3)

✅ A entered CORRECT password using capsules: Q1-A+C, Q2-B, Q3-C, Q4-D+B
🎉 Everyone escapes! 🎉
